title: Couples Coaching
description: We work with couples on the things that actually break relationships: communication, emotional patterns, and the small stuff that becomes big stuff. Grounded in psychology, not platitudes.

title: Mountain Guiding
description: Guided treks and hikes for people who want to get into the mountains safely — whether that's your first summit or your fiftieth.

title: Snowboard Lessons
description: Private snowboard instruction for beginners through intermediate riders. We'll get you off the beginner slope faster than you think.

title: Running & Outdoor Survival
description: Trail running coaching paired with the basics of outdoor survival — because running far means less if you don't know what to do once you're actually out there.

title: Mentoring for Teens & Young Adults
description: Coaching and mentorship for teen camps and youth groups — we've been the adults kids actually listen to.

title: DJ Basics
description: A hands-on introduction to DJing for complete beginners. No prior music experience needed, just curiosity.

title: Yoga & Breathwork
description: Foundational yoga and breathing practice for people who want to slow down without turning it into a whole lifestyle.
